info.title: Sentinel
info.description: Document Chasing System + AI Receptionist for UK Accountants

get.description: Basic health check
Readiness check - checks dependencies
Liveness check - simple ping
API root endpoint

post.description: Create a new organization

get.description: List all organizations

schema.title: Response List Organizations Api V1 Organizations  Get

get.description: Get a specific organization by ID

post.description:
Create a new user (Owner, Admin, or Manager)

Rules:
- Owners can create any user type
- Admins can create Admin or Manager users (but not Owners)
- Only Owners/Admins can create users

If creating a Manager, optionally provide permissions configuration

get.description:
List all users in organization

Rules:
- Owners/Admins see all users
- Managers only see other managers (not owners/admins)

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users  Get

get.description: Get a specific user by ID

patch.description:
Update a user

Rules:
- Owners/Admins can update any user in their organization
- Managers cannot update users

post.description:
Deactivate a user (soft delete)

Rules:
- Only Owners/Admins can deactivate users
- Admins cannot deactivate Owners
- Cannot deactivate last Owner
- Owners require two-step confirmation

Set or update Manager permissions

Only Owners/Admins can set permissions

get.description: Get Manager permissions

post.description:
Public tenant signup.

Creates:
- a new Organization (tenant)
- the first Owner user

Returns:
- a 2FA bootstrap payload (secret/otpauth_url/setup_token) so the caller can
  immediately enroll their authenticator app and then call:
  - POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/bootstrap/verify

post.description:
Get missing documents for a client, grouped by supplier

Returns transactions that:
- Require a document (document_required = true)
- Don't have received document (document_received = false)
- Are not excluded by rules

get.description: List all documents for a client with status

post.description:
Generate a presigned S3 URL for client to upload directly
(No authentication required - magic link based)

Used by client portal to upload files directly to S3

Finalize document upload after S3 upload completes
(Called by client portal after successful S3 upload)

This triggers:
1. Virus scanning (background)
2. File renaming (background)
3. OCR processing (background)
4. Forwarding to Xero (background)

get.description: Get a specific document

delete.description: Delete a document (soft delete in S3)

post.description: Mark document as forwarded to Xero
Transition a document state using the state machine.

Manually send a chase to a client immediately

Supports:
- Email chase
- SMS chase

Configure chase settings for a client
(frequency, escalation, channels)
Pause chasing for a client temporarily
Resume chasing for a client

get.description: Get chase history for a client

post.description:
Track when client clicks the magic link in chase
(Called from client portal)

get.description: Get a specific chase

Get transactions missing documents for a client, grouped by supplier

Filters:
- document_required = true
- document_received = false
- excluded = false
List all transactions for a client

schema.title: Response List Transactions Api V1 Transactions  Client Id  List Get

get.description: Get a specific transaction

post.description:
Manually trigger missing document detection for organization
(Refreshes the list from Xero)

Normally runs nightly. This allows urgent refresh.

Manual transaction upload for non-Xero firms (CSV).
Columns: Date, Supplier/Description, Amount, Reference

get.description: Get transaction statistics for organization dashboard

post.description:
Create a new exclusion rule for the organization

Only Owners and Admins can create rules

get.description: List all exclusion rules for an organization

patch.description:
Update an exclusion rule

Only Owners and Admins can update rules

delete.description:
Delete an exclusion rule (hard delete)

Only Owners and Admins can delete rules

get.description: Get a specific exclusion rule

post.description:
Create multiple exclusion rules at once

Only Owners and Admins can create rules

Initialize common UK exclusion rules for a new organization

Only Owners and Admins can initialize rules

get.description:
Get dashboard summary stats
(Must load in <2 seconds)

Get items that need accountant attention:
- Non-responsive clients (3+ chases, no uploads)
- VAT deadline urgency (≤7 days away, missing docs)
- Delivery failures
- Security issues (virus detected)
- Flagged uploads
Get clients that are actively uploading (no action needed)
Get detailed dashboard view for a specific client

post.description:
Perform bulk actions on multiple clients

Supported actions:
- pause_chasing: Disable chasing for selected clients
- resume_chasing: Enable chasing for selected clients
- change_frequency: Update chase frequency for selected clients
- send_chase: Send immediate chase to selected clients

post.description:
Upload a CSV file and auto-detect column mappings.
Returns suggested field mappings with confidence scores and sample data.
Confirm or adjust auto-detected column mapping.

Run validation on all rows and return preview with errors.
Includes first 20 rows with inline error/warning indicators.

get.description: Get the validation preview (re-runs validation if needed).

post.description:
Confirm the import and process all valid records.
Creates universal ledger entries and materializes Transactions for the chase workflow.

get.description: Get import session status and results.

delete.description: Cancel and delete an import session.

get.description: List import sessions for the current organization.

post.description:
Trigger a Xero import into the universal schema.
Fetches invoices/contacts/payments from Xero and normalizes them.

Public tenant signup.

- an Organization (tenant)
- the first Owner user for that tenant
and returns a 2FA bootstrap payload for immediate setup.
